title: helianthus annuus
intro: Helianthus annuus, also known as the common sunflower, is a large annual plant in the daisy family with large flower heads that are typically 6-12 inches in diameter. The medicinal properties of Helianthus annuus lie in its seeds, which are rich in vitamin E, selenium, and other nutrients, and have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and digestive issues. The health benefits of Helianthus annuus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable addition to a healthy diet. Helianthus annuus can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as oil, tea, and tincture, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
